song_name: Djo - End Of Beginning - Taylor Swift - Guilty As Sin
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 Just one more tear to cry[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]
One teardrop from my eye[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
You better save it for[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 The middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Am7[/ch]
When things aren't black-and-white[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Am I allowed to cry?[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 I dream of cracking locks[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Throwing my life to the wolves[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]Am7[/ch]
 Or the ocean rocks crashing into him tonight[/tab]

 He's a paradox, I'm seeing visions,
[tab]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 Am I bad or mad or wise?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Another version of me, I was in it[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning[/tab]



[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 This song has started now[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am7[/ch]
And you're just finding out[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Now isn't that a laugh?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
 A major sacrifice, but clueless at the time[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am7[/ch]
 These fatal fantasies[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Giving way to labored breath, taking all of me[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am7[/ch]
 We've already done it in my head[/tab]
[tab]                                               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
 If it's make believe, why does it feel like a vow we'll both uphold somehow?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
 What if he's written "mine" on my upper thigh[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Only in my mind?[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 One slip and falling back into the hedge maze[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Oh, what a way to die[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
 I keep recalling things we never did[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 Messy top lip kiss, how I long for our trysts[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Without ever touching his skin[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch] N.C.         [ch]Am7[/ch]
 How can I be guilty as sin[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 What if I roll the stone away?[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 They're gonna crucify me anyway[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
 What if the way you hold me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Is actually what's holy?[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]Am7[/ch]
 You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]Am7[/ch]
 You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]Am7[/ch]
 You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man[/tab]
N.C.
You take the man out of the


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]G/E[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Another version of me, I was in    it[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Am I allowed to cry?[/tab]
